description:
This quiz assesses proficiency with Regular Expressions, covering fundamental patterns, quantifiers, grouping, and advanced look‑around assertions. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, offering a supportive, encouraging tone that guides learners toward mastery. The content balances challenge with motivational feedback to reinforce learning.
Topics: Basic regex patterns, Quantifiers, Capture groups, Look‑around assertions, Pattern validation
Audience: Developers, QA engineers, and students with introductory regex experience who want to deepen their skill set.
